title: The Boys Datapack - Now with The Deep
description: A datapack adding several things from the show The Boys
body:
# **The Boys Datapack**

**This datapack is in the early stages of development, so I appreciate your patience as I work on adding more features.**
**The datapack is made for 1.20.1 but I plan on updating it in the future.**

## Supes:

- ### **Homelander:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

To become homelander run: "/function theboys:general/become_homelander" or use Compound-V

**Abilities:**
To cycle between abilities use respectively slots 9, 8 and 7

**- Strong Laser Vision:** Strong Laser Vision deals more damage and destroys blocks.

Use slot 9 to use this ability.

![Homnelander Strong Laser Vision](https://i.imgur.com/r9pxDwt.gif)

**- Laser Vision:**
Laser Vision deals damage to entities.

Use slot 8 to use this ability.

![Homelander Laser Vision](https://i.imgur.com/owuXjHs.gif)

**- X-Ray Vision:** Allows you to see entities trough walls.

Use slot 7 to use this ability.

![X-Ray Vision](https://i.imgur.com/FRIxxB9.png)

**Powers:**
- Creative Flight (Can be turned on or turned off, when on the player will be in creative mode and will always be cleared.)
- Super strenght
- Resistance
- Extra Health
- Knockback Resistance


</details>

- ### **Soldier Boy:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

To become Soldier Boy run: "/function theboys:general/become_soldierboy" or use Compound-V

**Abilities:**


**Radioactive Blast:** This ability creates a large radioactive beam that will wipe anything in its way. It can also remove the powers of supes.

You can use this ability by selecting slot 9 and holding shift. After using it, the ability will have to recharge.

![Soldier Boy using his Radioactive Blast Ability](https://i.imgur.com/S9zeTZr.gif)

**Powers:**
- Super strenght
- Resistance
- Extra Health
- Knockback Resistance

</details>

- ### **A-Train:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

To become A-Train run: "/function theboys:general/become_atrain" or use Compound-V

**Abilities:**


**Super Speed:** When using this ability you run realy fast but also use a lot of saturation. When running an entity over it deals them damage. 

You can use this ability by sprinting.

![A-Train Running someone over](https://i.imgur.com/ezVmdzH.gif)

**Powers:**
- Strenght
- Resistance
- Extra Health
- Super Speed

</details>

- ### **The Deep:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

To become The Deep run: "/function theboys:general/become_deep" or use Compound-V

**Abilities:**


**Select Target:** When you shift while selecting slot 9, you select the entity you are looking at. That entity will be attacked by the drowned mobs near you.

**Summon Drowned:** This ability will summon two drowned mobs that will help you attack any entity that you select.

You can use this ability by selecting slot 8 and sneaking

![The Deep Summoning Drowned](https://i.imgur.com/DsakNcC.gif)

**Powers:**
- Super strenght
- Resistance
- Extra Health
- Underwater breathing
- Underwater buffs
- Buff Drowned
- Reproduce axolotls (lore accurate)

</details>

## Other Features:

- ### **Compound-V:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

To get Compound-V run: "/loot give @s loot theboys:entities/get_v" or craft it.

To craft Compound-V you need to drop the following items into a cauldron filled with water:

- Strenght II Potion
- Night Vision Potion (3min)
- Leaping II Potion
- Fire Resistance Potion (3min)
- Swiftness II Potion
- V-Fragment (obtained when killing a warden)

![Crafting Compound-V](https://i.imgur.com/44ImHDn.gif)

When using Compound-V you have a chance of becoming one of the avaliable supes. Note that only one player can be one specific supe.

</details>

## Adittional Info:

### **Planed features for this datapack:**
- Temp-V
- Starlight
- Stormfront
- Other supes
- Better organization and optimization
- Homelander actual flight

**Vote on the next big feature to get added:** [Vote Here](https://poll-maker.com/poll5242726x478F4940-158)
